CHAIR: Brief for the 3.5 GHz licensing decision.
CONTEXT: The current sharing model is under review.
ALICE: We have several options on the table.
OPTION: Continue with SAS-only sharing.
OPTION: Move to a hybrid SAS plus incumbent model.
BOB: My recommendation is the hybrid model.
RECOMMENDATION: Move to the hybrid SAS plus incumbent model.
RATIONALE: Hybrid provides better protection for incumbents while preserving SAS flexibility.
